creator: freebsd@centromere.net
text:
I just recently switched from -STABLE to -CURRENT and have been
experiencing intermittent crashes almost daily. Based on the stack
trace, I suspect that the problem lies in the re driver:

#10 0xffffffff803ddb00 in re_txeof (sc=0xffffff8000c53000)
    at /usr/src/sys/dev/re/if_re.c:2388

I have attached the crash report to this PR.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
